manifest.author: ioannisxirouxakis
manifest.changelog:
ioannisxirr's Instafel backup v57

- Redesigned the button of sending a reel/post to a new group chat, making it way smaller and more beautiful.
- You can now mention multiple people under one mention sticker in stories.
- Fixed the issue where you could not see some long post descriptions.
- You can now send music stickers in chats that start playing the music from any timestamp that you want.
- Redesigned the search menu in Explore.
- Minor changes and clean-ups.
manifest.name: ioannisxir's Instafel Backup
manifest.description: Yeah, most popular backup in the world!
